use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation or header components
Show author attribution in blog posts or articles
Represent team members in organizational charts or dashboards
Display user avatars in comments or discussion threads
Serve as a visual identifier in notification or messaging interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible Avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with support for images and fallback display. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with a clean rounded-full design suitable for any interface requiring user or entity representation. Includes proper ref forwarding and displayName patterns for React component compatibility.
